inputs.text: Mujhe thoda bukhar hai, sir dard ho raha hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Though possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever can still be due to viral causes, though abdominal symptoms are less typical

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal symptoms can be seen in typhoid, but other diagnoses are more likely at this stage

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Though possible, the combination of symptoms is less typical for gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause high fever but the pattern and other symptoms do not perfectly match

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bhi bahut bukhar hai, thakaan hai, aur pet mein bahut dard hai, kuch jaundice jaisa bhi lag raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent high fever, abdominal pain, and jaundice are consistent with advanced typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the progression of symptoms and specific findings

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms and test results
